application_setting.title: Application Settings
application_setting.description: Manage system-wide settings used by platform features, course charges, and installment schedules.
application_setting.enabled_description: AI features are available to users.
application_setting.disabled_description: AI features are unavailable to users.
application_setting.tax_rate_description: Decimal tax rate applied when calculating course charges.
application_setting.installment_due_day_description: Day of month used when generating installment due dates.
